design_context: Mobile Web App (PWA) focusing on Finance & Travel

typography.pairing_rules: Use Cabinet Grotesk for high-impact numbers (totals, balances) and headings. Use Manrope for all transaction lists, labels, and body copy to ensure maximum legibility at small mobile sizes.

spacing_and_layout.mobile_container: max-w-md mx-auto relative min-h-[100dvh] bg-[#F9F8F6] shadow-2xl overflow-x-hidden pb-24

bottom_navigation.style: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 max-w-md mx-auto pb-safe pt-2 px-6 flex justify-between items-center backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-t border-black/5 z-50
bottom_navigation.fab: absolute -top-6 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 w-14 h-14 bg-[#1A3626] rounded-full shadow-lg flex items-center justify-center text-white active:scale-95 transition-transform

bottom_sheet.style: fixed inset-x-0 bottom-0 max-w-md mx-auto bg-white rounded-t-3xl shadow-[0_-8px_32px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)] z-50 transform transition-transform
bottom_sheet.handle: w-12 h-1.5 bg-gray-200 rounded-full mx-auto mt-3 mb-5

cards.default: bg-white rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm border border-black/5
cards.ai_insight: bg-[#FDF7E7] rounded-2xl p-4 border border-[#C29329]/20 relative overflow-hidden

currency_pill.style: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 bg-gray-100 text-gray-700 text-xs font-semibold rounded-full tracking-wide

motion_and_microinteractions.typing_effect: staggered reveal using framer-motion for auto-tagger text

ai_magic_features.smart_payment_toast: Native-style toast notification sliding from top. Uses ai_magic.light background with a subtle ai_magic.gradient top border. Includes a distinct 'Sparkle' icon.
ai_magic_features.budget_estimator: Card with animated progress bars filling up on load, representing different categories. Use the pie_chart_palette for category bars.
ai_magic_features.auto_category_tagger: A small chip that pops up next to the amount input while typing, using a scale-in animation and a subtle glow.
ai_magic_features.fun_facts_feed: Horizontal scrollable list (Snap scrolling) of cards. Soft parallax effect on background images if used.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the app feels like a native mobile app. Use a max-w-md container centered on desktop with a subtle device frame or shadow, simulating a mobile viewport.
Use framer-motion for route transitions, bottom sheet sliding, and AI magical reveals.
For the Recharts pie chart, enforce a 0 margin and use the pie_chart_palette provided. Ensure the chart is highly readable on small screens.
Implement the 'Simulate UPI Payment' as a floating toast or bottom sheet that prompts the user to add the expense automatically.
Do NOT use Inter or Space Grotesk. Add Google Fonts links for 'Cabinet Grotesk' (or equivalent strong display sans like 'Outfit' if Cabinet is unavailable via standard CDNs) and 'Manrope'.
Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing.
For multi-currency, visually prioritize the trip's local currency in large text, and show the converted home currency in a smaller currency_pill.
